headline: Senior Data Scientist | ML Engineering | Geospatial Analytics
occupation: Senior Data Scientist at Northwind Analytics
summary: Data scientist with 8 years of experience building machine learning systems for climate and geospatial applications. DAAD alumnus. Speaker at PyData Berlin 2024.

experiences.title: Senior Data Scientist
experiences.description: Leads a team of 4 building satellite-imagery classification pipelines (PyTorch, Sentinel-2) that cut manual land-survey costs by 40%.

experiences.title: Data Scientist
experiences.description: Built demand-forecasting models serving 2M daily predictions.

volunteer_work.title: Mentor
